name: ride-agent-skill
description: TADA Ride Skill - OpenClaw Skill + Node scripts

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && BUILD_ENV=dev tsup && mv dist/cli/tada.js dist/cli/tada && chmod +x dist/cli/tada && cp SKILL.md README.md package.json dist/skill/ && cp -r references dist/skill/ && node scripts/bake-readme-repo.mjs dev && node scripts/bake-skill-license.mjs
scripts.build:dev: rm -rf dist && BUILD_ENV=dev tsup && mv dist/cli/tada.js dist/cli/tada && chmod +x dist/cli/tada && cp SKILL.md README.md package.json dist/skill/ && cp -r references dist/skill/ && node scripts/bake-readme-repo.mjs dev && node scripts/bake-skill-license.mjs
scripts.build:staging: rm -rf dist && BUILD_ENV=staging tsup && mv dist/cli/tada.js dist/cli/tada && chmod +x dist/cli/tada && cp SKILL.md README.md package.json dist/skill/ && cp -r references dist/skill/ && node scripts/bake-readme-repo.mjs staging && node scripts/bake-skill-license.mjs
scripts.build:prod: rm -rf dist && BUILD_ENV=prod tsup && mv dist/cli/tada.js dist/cli/tada && chmod +x dist/cli/tada && cp SKILL.md README.md package.json dist/skill/ && cp -r references dist/skill/ && node scripts/bake-readme-repo.mjs prod && node scripts/bake-skill-license.mjs
